code:
import io
import string

let maybe_target = io.read_line()
let target = match maybe_target
when Some(t)
  string.trim(t)
when None
  ""
end

let body = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(body)

mut count = 0
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  let tok = match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(t)
    t
  when None
    ""
  end
  if tok == target
    count = count + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end

print("count=#{count}")
